entries.parsedImagePrompt: Medium shot, eye-level angle, static frame. Two distinct characters with completely different outfits and features, standing separately with clear space between them: On the left of the frame, a young man in his late twenties with short neatly side-parted dark brown hair, an oval face and deep-set dark brown eyes. He wears a light blue chambray button-down over a white crew neck tee, sleeves cuffed to mid-forearm. He watches the woman, a slight smile formed at the corner of his mouth, hands resting at his sides. On the right of the frame, a young woman in her early twenties with shoulder-length wavy dark brown hair, a heart-shaped face with large warm almond eyes and full pink lips. She wears a light blue knit cardigan over a cream round-neck t-shirt, a cream canvas backpack slung over one shoulder. She gestures toward her backpack with one hand, her gaze held mid-transition, eyes shifting from the bag toward him as her mouth gently parts mid-syllable. A rain-streaked awning frames them, a small round table with chairs against the window, a large potted plant nearby. Rain cascades steadily just beyond the awning's edge onto the wet sidewalk. Medium depth of field keeps both characters sharp. Soft diffused natural overcast light, key light from the street side. Cool rainy day color tone. Artwork in cgstyle_9b, ultimate CG texture with Iray skin rendering, realistic physical light and shadow, translucent rosy smooth skin texture, cinematic render quality, 2.5D semi-realistic style. Sharply defined facial features, clear sparkling eyes with natural highlights, gentle diffused lighting on face, flawless clear complexion.
entries.parsedVideoPrompt:
[Scene] The awning of a rainy coffee shop frames the interaction completely. Light rain patters on the metal awning with soft metallic impacts just above them, water splashing onto the wet sidewalk at the edge of their shelter. A small round table with chairs stands against the window to the right, a large potted plant nearby. Gentle clinking of cups and saucers drifts from inside the café. Fabric rustles quietly as Linh shifts her weight. Continuous rainfall fills the background with steady white noise, blurred pedestrians hurrying past with umbrellas in the distance.
[Characters] Linh: Upper body visible. A young woman with a heart-shaped face, large warm almond eyes, shoulder-length wavy dark brown hair. Wearing a light blue knit cardigan over a cream round-neck t-shirt, a cream canvas backpack slung over one shoulder. Speaking animatedly, bright expression. Minh: Upper body visible. A young man with an oval face, deep-set dark brown eyes, short neatly side-parted dark brown hair. Wearing a light blue chambray button-down shirt over a white crew neck tee, sleeves cuffed. Smiling gently, calm and attentive.

Shot 1 (Medium Two-Shot, 3.0s): Locked-off camera, natural ambient motion flows throughout.
Linh: "I have two."
Action: Linh's hand completes the gesturing arc toward the backpack, fingers relaxing as the motion ends, her lips moving through the final syllable of her statement. Her gaze finishes its sweep toward Minh's face, now locked on his expression. Minh absorbs her words, his head dipping slowly in a nod, the smile at the corner of his mouth deepening.
